name: lazytax
description: A secure AI tax caseworker for Indian taxpayers, CAs, and tax professionals.

interface.shortDescription: One tax case for taxpayers and their trusted practitioners.
interface.longDescription: LazyTax is the agentic tax casework layer for Indian taxpayers, CAs, and tax professionals. Its taxpayer concierge consolidates authorized documents, finds missing evidence, reconciles sources, and explains deterministic results. Its practitioner AI-junior workflow prioritizes assigned cases, preserves evidence lineage, and supports maker-checker review. Both roles share one Tax Proof Pack; LazyTax augments professional judgment and never submits, pays, or e-verifies without explicit contextual approval.
defaultPrompt: Take over my tax filing: organize these documents, find what's missing, and guide me to completion.
Act as my AI tax junior: prioritize my assigned cases and show what needs preparer or reviewer action.
Explain and demonstrate what LazyTax enforces beyond Codex reasoning: evidence lineage, deterministic replay, privacy boundaries, and maker-checker controls.
